---
name: New skill
about: Propose a new recruiting skill for the library
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: 'new skill'
assignees: ''
---

## Discipline

What role or discipline does this skill cover? Be specific — "marketing hiring" is too broad, "performance marketing hiring" is a skill.

## Gap

What does the existing library not cover that this would address?

## What you'd expect it to do

Describe the kind of tasks or outputs this skill should enable. Examples:
- Source candidates from specific platforms
- Screen for signals specific to this role
- Write JDs or outreach that reflect how this discipline actually works

## Your background

Have you hired in this discipline? Any context on how you've validated the content helps.

## Ready to write it?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR with the skill
- [ ] No, flagging the gap — happy for someone else to pick it up
